markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 65. Pilots for Matagorda & Lavaca Bays
##### § 65.002 — Provisions for Branch Pilots Applicable

The provisions of Chapter 62 (Navigation District Pilot Boards) relating to branch pilots at ports, to the extent applicable, apply to pilots appointed under this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The provisions of Chapter 62 (Navigation District Pilot Boards) relating to branch pilots at ports, to the extent applicable, apply to pilots appointed under this chapter.
